goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'little seoul'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '7 people' at '11:15' on 'saturday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'huntingdon marriott hotel'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for 'the same group of people' and '3 nights' starting from 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge

Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 7 people at 11:15 on saturday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called huntingdon marriott hotel
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 3 nights starting from the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
